app.name: Generate Exams | Drive
app.short_description: Generate exam documents and manage Drive from the Deal.
app.long_description: Private app for Zendesk Sell deal_card: ensures a Drive folder, generates documents from templates, and creates a Sell note with links.
app.installation_instructions: Configure backend_api_key (secure), drive_root_folder_id, and optionally backend_base_url / drive_shared_drive_id.
